outDir.description: Directory where pipeline outputs/logs are written.

quiet.description: Suppress UI notifications during pipeline execution.

priority.description: Job execution priority in the queue.

continueOnError.description: v3.8.0: job-level default for step.continueOnError. When true, every step that does not set its own continueOnError inherits this value. Per-step overrides always win.

cmd.description: Command ID to execute via vscode.commands.executeCommand.

description.description: Optional human-readable note for this step (not consumed by runner; useful for generated job files and IDE tooltips).

id.description: Optional stable identifier for this step (not consumed by runner today; reserved for named step references in a future revision).

args.description: Additional command arguments merged into headless options. String values may include $step[N].output / $step[N].result.<field> / $step[prev].* tokens for inter-step data flow.

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to outDir).

continueOnError.description: Continue pipeline execution after this step fails.

expectOutput.description: Force output existence validation on/off for this step.

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts after an initial failure.

retryDelayMs.description: Delay between retry attempts in milliseconds.

onResult.description: Conditional branching rule evaluated against the step output JSON. See docs/HEXCORE_AUTOMATION.md §Conditional Branching.

field.description: Top-level field name in the step output JSON to evaluate.

operator.description: Comparison operator. contains/equals/not/regex work on string coercion; gt/lt coerce to Number.

value.description: Value compared against the field. For regex, the string is compiled as a RegExp.

action.description: skip N (actionValue=N, default 1); goto INDEX (actionValue=0-based step index); abort (actionValue=reason string); log (actionValue=message).

actionValue.description: Action parameter. Integer for skip/goto, string for abort/log. Jumps are bounded by MAX_LOOP_ITERATIONS (100).
